content_body: Thank you for opening up this comfortable cabin. It was just what the doctor ordered. This environment is perfect for rejuvenation. My husband and I arrived Monday after a scenic route. It rained Tuesday so we didn’t go anywhere, but enjoyed the surroundings and animals - deer, groundhogs, and Charlie the Koi. My husband caught two fish in the pond after the rain slowed down. Wednesday - we went on hikes - the waterfalls are beautiful. We met some locals at the bar/restaurant - great and friendly.  Thursday came too soon. We should have booked a full week, however I wanted to stay at this cabin and it was worth it. Thank you for everything! We will be back…
title: Worth It!
